note: Archetype traversal route on runway (Phase B, FID-0031/D4). Bond walks forward, strafes right, then turns (GE007_AUTO_FORWARD/RIGHT/CRIGHT baked into the captured OSContPad stream) with the level intro skipped (replay_env) so the movement window exercises the level geometry/collision sim. Deterministic under the determinism envelope + replay_env: record==replay1==replay2 (sim_state_hash byte-exact, verified across independent recordings). The ares-free determinism half of the runway gate:true route; the ares trace comparison is the manual oracle step (movement_oracle_capture.sh --route runway_traverse). Regenerate only via scratchpad/finalize_archetype_tapes.sh. Gated by tools/fidelity/gate_routes_smoke.sh + tools/fidelity/tape_regression.sh. Re-baselined 2026-07-11 (b94a6243900d552e→7ce3a55a6b47b00a): near the end of this route's window a guard (chr=24, item=8/KF7, AutomaticFiringRate=3) enters sustained full-auto line-of-sight on Bond (GE007_TRACE_GUARD_AUTOFIRE: 2 gate-fires at eff_rate=9). The recorded b94a6243900d552e was captured (commit 9e661b3) against a stale pre-FID-0066 ge007 binary (linked before the FID-0066 chrlv.c fix landed, despite the source tree already containing it) and is exactly the legacy (GE007_FIRE_RATE_AUTHENTIC=0) hash -- kept here as fire_rate_authentic_off_hash, verified byte-identical on both a git-archive build of b289b60 (the pre-merge-train tip) and the current tree's opt-out replay. bunker1_traverse/facility_traverse/surface1_traverse carry zero guard-autofire events in their windows and are unaffected (hashes unchanged). See docs/fidelity/derivations/FID-0066-npc-fire-rate.md and the P1a/Phase-B repair evidence for the full attribution.
